title: Meridian — Conversation Trace Explorer

panels.title: Trace Search — enter Relationship ID above
Traces — click a row to drill into the full span waterfall
Agent Latency — calls in the last 3 hours
Instructions — How to use this dashboard

options.content:
## Conversation Trace Explorer

1. **Enter a Relationship ID** (e.g. `REL-00042`) in the **Relationship / Trace ID** variable at the top.
2. The **Trace Search** panel shows all gateway traces that touched that relationship — click any row to open the full span waterfall.
3. The **span waterfall** shows: intent classify → entity extract → Cerbos ABAC → agent fan-out (HTTP + MCP in parallel) → answer synthesis.
4. To look up a specific trace by ID, paste the trace ID directly in the variable box.
5. The **Agent Latency** and **Intent/Auth** panels show aggregate signals for the selected time window.

**Key span names to look for:**
- `chat.handle` — root gateway span (total E2E time)
- `intent.classify` — LLM routing decision
- `entity.extract` — entity extraction (relationship ID resolution)
- `cerbos.check` — ABAC entitlement check
- `agent.*` — per-agent calls with `agent.id`, `agent.protocol`, `agent.model` attributes

## How to use Conversation Logs

1. **Paste a Conversation ID** into the **Conversation ID** variable at the top of this dashboard (e.g. a UUID emitted by the gateway as MDC key `convId`).
2. The **All Logs** panel below shows every log line across all `meridian-*` services that contain that conversation ID — gateway intent classification, Cerbos ABAC decisions, agent fan-out calls and synthesis steps.
3. The **Errors & Warnings** panel filters to `ERROR` and `WARN` lines only — use this to diagnose a failed or degraded request.
4. **Click a `traceId` value** in any log line to jump directly to the Tempo span waterfall for that request.
5. If no logs appear, confirm that Promtail is running (`docker compose ps promtail`) and that the gateway emits `convId` in structured JSON logs.

panels.description: All log lines from every Meridian service that contain the selected conversation ID — including gateway request handling, intent classification, Cerbos decisions, agent fan-out and answer synthesis. Click a traceId value to open the corresponding Tempo trace.
panels.title: All Logs for Conversation — $convId

panels.description: ERROR and WARN log lines only for the selected conversation ID — surfaces exceptions, circuit breaker trips, Cerbos denials and synthesis failures without noise from INFO-level call tracing. Use this first when a banker reports an unexpected or incomplete answer.
panels.title: Errors and Warnings — $convId
